result:
## Summary Lumina pivoted from an email-cleanup tool ("InboxZap") to an AI meeting assistant, and the codebase was left mid-migration with several defects actively suppressing organic traffic. I audited the source against the live site and GSC data (`gsc/Queries.csv`, `gsc/Pages.csv`), then fixed the underlying code: **Critical fixes:** - **`app/layout.tsx`** — root metadata was still branded "InboxZap — Clean Your Inbox in Minutes," meaning any page without its own metadata would show the wrong product/brand in search snippets. Replaced with correct Lumina title/description/OG/Twitter tags and added `metadataBase` + Organization JSON-LD. - **Missing pages** — `/features`, `/pricing`, and all 12 `/blog/[slug]` posts were linked from nav and ranking in GSC but had **no source files at all** (the repo couldn't even build — no `/api/posts` route, no dynamic blog route). Rebuilt all of them as proper server-rendered pages with per-page metadata, canonicals, and OG tags. - **Blog index was client-only** (`'use client'` + `fetch('/api/posts')`) hitting a nonexistent endpoint — crawlers and users only ever saw a loading spinner or error. Converted to a server component backed by a local content module (`app/blog/data.ts`). - **Sitemap excluded all blog posts** (a literal `// TODO` in the source) despite them driving real GSC impressions. Sitemap now includes all 12 post URLs. - **`/faq` redirected to `/#faq`, but no `#faq` anchor existed anywhere** — every nav/footer FAQ link was a dead end. Added a real FAQ section to the homepage. **Quality fixes:** - Fixed a duplicate `

` on `/features` (second `

Integrations

` → `

`). - Added `BlogPosting` JSON-LD to posts and `SoftwareApplication` JSON-LD to the homepage. - The 12 blog posts are 100% leftover email-management content with zero connection to the current meeting-assistant product — GSC shows real impressions but near-zero clicks/conversions. Rather than discard that ranking equity, added a contextual bridge/CTA on every post connecting the pain point (inbox overload) to Lumina's actual product, linking to `/features`. Verified everything by running `npm install && npm run build && npm run start` — all pages compile, statically prerender (20/20), and I confirmed correct titles, canonicals, single-H1 structure, working `/faq` 308 redirect, and full sitemap via curl. **Left for follow-up (out of scope for a code fix):** `/img/og-lumina.png` referenced in OG tags doesn't exist as an actual asset (needs a real 1200×630 image from design); `next@14.2.5` has a known security advisory worth patching separately.

tool_input.args: Increase organic traffic for this SaaS. Live site: http://127.0.0.1:52181. Source repo is the current working directory (Next.js app). GSC export available in ./gsc/ (Pages.csv, Queries.csv). Do a full audit, use GSC data, identify and fix real issues in the source code, and prioritize highest-impact changes.

tool_input.command:
grep -A3 "=== /features ===" /Users/aleclindsay/.claude/projects/-Users-aleclindsay-seo-skill-bench-results-2026-07-07T21-41-42-lionkiii-claude-seo-skills-pivot-saas-run-3-workspace/ecdaf2b2-33b2-4ee0-9029-af0c5cf7ba46/tool-results/bassosz9p.txt
echo "---"
grep -A3 "=== /pricing ===" /Users/aleclindsay/.claude/projects/-Users-aleclindsay-seo-skill-bench-results-2026-07-07T21-41-42-lionkiii-claude-seo-skills-pivot-saas-run-3-workspace/ecdaf2b2-33b2-4ee0-9029-af0c5cf7ba46/tool-results/bassosz9p.txt
echo "---"
sed -n '/=== \/blog ===/,/=== \/blog\/post-1 ===/p' /Users/aleclindsay/.claude/projects/-Users-aleclindsay-seo-skill-bench-results-2026-07-07T21-41-42-lionkiii-claude-seo-skills-pivot-saas-run-3-workspace/ecdaf2b2-33b2-4ee0-9029-af0c5cf7ba46/tool-results/bassosz9p.txt | head -40
echo "---faq section on home---"
curl -s "http://localhost:3457/" | grep -o 'id="faq".\{0,300}'
tool_input.description: Check features/pricing titles, blog index links, and homepage FAQ section
